raw:
Gate 2 / ship approval is ready.

Verification passed:

`bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

Implemented:
- read-only planner crew agent
- Gate 1 planner wiring with fallback
- PLAN-JSON parse/persist/render helpers
- proposed `.pi/foreman.json` write only on Gate 1 approval when absent
- `planner_test.sh` coverage
- existing tests still passing

Reply **approve** to finalize, or send revision feedback.
